title: CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS - 211info
text: FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers car seats, help with installation, and an inspection with a Child Passenger Safety Certified Technician. 401 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 792-0371 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 792-0371 Charissa Moulton Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Free or low-cost DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Grant County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Child Passenger Safety Seats Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - BABY STEPS BIRTH AND BEYOND PRENATAL EDUCATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - GRANT COUNTY LACTATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN IN BETWEEN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON AND PARENTS AS TEACHERS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES AND RESOURCE LIBRARY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
